attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SGL.LEDGER_ID,
SGL.NAME, 
SGL.SHORT_NAME, 
SGL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, 
SGL.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
SGL.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, 
SGL.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
SGL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, 
SGL.CURRENCY_CODE, 
SGL.PERIOD_SET_NAME, 
SGL.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, 
SGL.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, 
SGL.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, 
SGL.DESCRIPTION, 
SGL.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, 
SGL.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, 
SGL.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
SGL.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, 
SGL.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
SGL.ATTRIBUTE1,
SGL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SGL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SGL.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
(SELECT 
CAST(ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID AS BIGINT) AS LEDGER_ID,
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.NAME, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.SHORT_NAME, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.CURRENCY_CODE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.DESCRIPTION, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE1,
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.GLOBAL_NAME, 
ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_LEDGERS
UNION ALL
SELECT 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID,
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.NAME, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.SHORT_NAME, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.ALC_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.LE_LEDGER_TYPE_CODE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.CURRENCY_CODE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.ACCOUNTED_PERIOD_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.DESCRIPTION, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.DAILY_TRANSLATION_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_AVG_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.BUDGET_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.ATTRIBUTE1,
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.GLOBAL_NAME, 
ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_GL_LEDGERS
) SGL 
WHERE (SGL.LEDGER_ID,SGL.GLOBAL_NAME )
NOT IN (SELECT LEDGER_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGERS)
